actor_claims.actor_label: Longview clients and certain related parties
actor_claims.quote_text: Longview Asset Management, LLC (“Longview”), on behalf of Longview clients and certain related parties

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: On December 14, 2014, the Company entered into a voting agreement (the “voting agreement”) with Parent and Longview Asset Management, LLC (“Longview”), on behalf of Longview clients and certain related parties. Under the voting agreement, Longview agreed, among other things, to vote or cause to be voted 7,424,591 shares of common stock, which represent approximately 7.5% of the total outstanding shares of common stock as of the close of business on the record date, in favor of the adoption of the merger agreement
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: agreed to vote or cause to be voted shares of common stock in favor of the adoption of the merger agreement

actor_relation_claims.object_label: the merger or the merger agreement
actor_relation_claims.quote_text: Longview agreed, among other things, to vote or cause to be voted 7,424,591 shares of common stock, which represent approximately 7.5% of the total outstanding shares of common stock as of the close of business on the record date, in favor of the adoption of the merger agreement, and against any other action, proposal, agreement or transaction made in opposition to or competition with the merger or the merger agreement that is not approved by the board
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: agreed to vote against any action, proposal, agreement or transaction made in opposition to or competition with the merger or merger agreement not approved by the board
